title: senecio elmeri
intro: Senecio elmeri, also known as Elmer's ragwort, is a plant species within the daisy family that is native to the Philippines. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain alkaloids that have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and other ailments. The health benefits of Senecio elmeri include its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties, which may help to reduce fever and relieve pain. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves are often dried, crushed, and then used to make infusions or decoctions, which are consumed to alleviate various health conditions.
